name: Dryn "Not Usually a Sign guy... but geeze"

sheet.name: Dryn "Not Usually a Sign guy... but geeze"
sheet.background_story:
"GET A BRAIN MORANS!"

^ this was my sign.  

I was there during the protest of the Judicar.  I honestly thought it would be peaceful.  but that word doesn't have any meaning in these Forsaken Lands.  

And no, I didn't kill her.  But I also didn't try to stop the mob from killing her.  That guilt weighs heavily on my mind.

I somehow feel compelled to stop... no... assist the Crow with the ritual this evening?  That doesn't make any sense.  No idea where this thought is coming from...  

maybe I can find some sort of redemption. Her forgiveness...
